issue_summary: Removed unchecked exceptions from method signatures. See Commons-Dev mailing list http://mail-archives.apache.org/mod_mbox/commons-dev/201201.mbox/%3C20120113105913.GM6537%40dusk.harfang.homelinux.org%3E "Effective Java, second edition", item 62.
code_before: int nextInt(int lower, int upper) throws NumberIsTooLargeException;
